tasks.subject: Task 1: Project scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the Vite project in `dashboard/`, install all dependencies, configure Tailwind v4, and copy CSVs to `public/data/`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/vite.config.ts", "dashboard/src/index.css", "dashboard/src/main.tsx", "dashboard/src/App.tsx", "dashboard/public/data/"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev starts without errors", "dark page renders", "CSVs accessible at /data/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TypeScript types + CSV data hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define typed interfaces for all 8 CSV schemas and implement `useCSVData` that fetches all files in parallel with Papa Parse.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types.ts", "src/hooks/useCSVData.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tsc --noEmit exits 0", "useCSVData returns typed CSVData"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: App shell + PeriodToggle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `useCSVData` into `App.tsx` with loading/error states, period state, and a `PeriodToggle` component.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/PeriodToggle.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["period toggle renders", "active period highlighted", "loading state shown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Summary Cards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 4 stat cards (Total Cost, API Calls, Sessions, Projects) that update when the period toggle changes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/SummaryCards.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 cards render", "30 Days shows $228.69", "values update on period change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Daily Spend Chart
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bar chart showing cost per day, filtered by the selected period.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/DailyChart.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bar chart renders", "tooltip shows cost", "period filter changes bars"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Activity + Models Charts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two side-by-side horizontal bar charts — activity breakdown and cost by model — both period-filtered.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/ActivityChart.tsx", "src/components/ModelsChart.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["horizontal bar charts render side by side", "Activity top is Feature Dev", "Models top is Sonnet 4.6"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Projects Chart + Sessions Table
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Horizontal bar chart for top 10 projects by cost and a table of top 20 sessions sorted by cost.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/ProjectsChart.tsx", "src/components/SessionsTable.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["projects top = vscode-git-client $71.63", "sessions top = $18.76", "period toggle has no effect"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Tools + Shell Commands Charts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two side-by-side horizontal bar charts for tool calls and shell command usage. Full page verified.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/ToolsChart.tsx", "src/components/ShellCommandsChart.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tools chart Bash first", "shell commands grep first", "tsc passes"]}
```
